arts.ttl: Official: Lamine Yamal bags La Liga player of the Month award for September
arts.sum: La Liga announced on Friday evening the winner of their Player of the Month award for September, and the second winner of the award this season. As speculated yesterday online,…

arts.ttl: WATCH: Szczęsny joins Barcelona training for first time
arts.sum: Wojciech Szczęsny joined up with his Barcelona team-mates on Friday in training for the first time since sealing his move to the Catalan giants . Barcelona’s latest addition to the squad isn’t expected to be match fit for a little while, with the international break coming at a good time for the former Juventus man.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star slowly ‘winning over’ Hansi Flick
arts.sum: Barcelona youngster Héctor Fort has begun to earn the trust of new head coach Hansi Flick. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have on Friday provided an insight into the…
